channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal and Safety Concerns with Illegal Bike Taxis in Kochi
item.description: The article highlights the dangers posed by illegal bike taxi operations in Kochi, Kerala. A woman from Kozhikode, Sani Krishna, was denied compensation after a road accident involving an unlicensed b...

item.title: Trump's Speech Rehashes Old Conspiracy Theories Amid Political Concerns
item.description: Former Trump administration Homeland Security staffer Miles Taylor criticized the president's planned primetime speech, arguing it reveals declining mental faculties. Trump intends to reiterate basele...

item.title: Ukrainians protest Zelensky's dismissal of defense minister
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky's decision to remove his youthful defense minister, Mykhailo Fedorov, has sparked widespread protests across the country. Fedorov, known for his innovative contr...

item.title: Shakira's Top 20 Songs: A Ranking of Her Greatest Hits
item.description: This article ranks Shakira's 20 best songs, highlighting her iconic tracks from various eras. It includes her World Cup anthem 'Hips Don’t Lie', collaborations with Beyoncé and Karol G, and her defini...

item.title: Activist faces death threats amid anti-illegal immigration advocacy
item.description: Nkosikhona Ndabandaba, known as 'Phakel'umthakathi', has disclosed receiving death threats due to his activism against illegal immigration. Leading the Insizwa Nobunsizwa movement and collaborating wi...

item.title: Philippine Seafarers Recover After Drone Attack on Oil Tanker
item.description: Two Filipino seafarers who were injured during a drone attack on the Cameroon-flagged oil tanker M/V Blue have returned to the Philippines. The incident occurred in the Black Sea on July 8, causing a ...

item.title: Dispute Over Premature Bus Relocation to Kange Terminal in Tanga
item.description: Tensions have escalated in Tanga city after the sudden relocation of passenger buses to Kange bus terminal, sparking disputes between transporters and passengers. The move was implemented before promi...

item.title: Discover Airlines Boosts Connectivity Between Germany and Namibia with New Flight Frequencies
item.description: Discover Airlines, a German leisure carrier under the Lufthansa Group, has announced plans to significantly expand its direct flight services between Munich and Windhoek starting April 2027. This move...

item.title: CIPM holds first virtual induction, certifies 78 HR professionals
item.description: The Chartered Institute of Personnel Management of Nigeria (CIPM) celebrated its 71st Induction Ceremony, marking its first virtual event in history. During the ceremony, 78 new HR professionals were ...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked 2026: New Foldables, Smartwatches, and Surprises
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, 2026, will unveil new foldable phones, smartwatches, and potential surprises. Key highlights include the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 foldables, featuring l...

item.title: Rescue operation saves sole survivor after fatal British Columbia helicopter incident
item.description: A video has captured the dramatic rescue of a single survivor following a catastrophic helicopter crash in British Columbia. The incident, which occurred on July 16, 2026, involved a helicopter that c...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Probes Origins of Crime Intelligence Investigation into Dumisani Khumalo
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry has intensified scrutiny over the initiation and handling of an investigation into Crime Intelligence head Dumisani Khumalo, following testimony from IDAC investigat...

item.title: Chinese State Media's Racist Video Depicts Filipinos as Monkeys Sparks Outrage
item.description: A video released by Chinese state media that portrays Filipinos as monkeys has sparked widespread outrage among Filipinos and international observers. The controversial content, which was shared on so...

item.title: Leicester legends share use of traditional remedies for injury recovery
item.description: Jamie Vardy, ex-legenda of Leicester City, spoke about how his Nigerian teammates Wilfred Ndidi and Kelechi Iheanacho used 'juju cream' to treat minor injuries during their time at the club. The forme...

item.title: WAGs reflect on England's World Cup exit as they remove children's England shirts
item.description: The article highlights the emotional reactions of Women's and Girls' Association (WAGs) following England's defeat in the 2022 FIFA World Cup. It focuses on how these partners, including celebrities l...

item.title: BP Sells Majority of Venture Portfolio to Nordic Firm After 20 Years of Investments
item.description: BP, a major oil company, has decided to shut down its corporate venture arm after 20 years of operation. This decision comes after the company pivoted away from clean energy initiatives earlier this y...

item.title: Escalation of military threats and civilian casualties in Iran-US conflict
item.description: The article details the escalating military tensions between Iran and the United States, with both nations intensifying their threats and strikes. Iran has warned of devastating attacks on regional in...

item.title: Trump's Limited Strategies in US-Iran Conflict Over Hormuz Control
item.description: The article discusses the resumption of hostilities between the US and Iran, with Donald Trump adopting aggressive military and economic measures. Despite his vast military power, Trump's options are ...

item.title: Canada to retain full toll revenue from Gordie Howe bridge until debt is repaid
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has confirmed that tolls from the Gordie Howe International Bridge will not be split with the United States until the $6.4 billion of Canadian investment is fully repaid. Wh...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Commends Toyota's R10.4bn Investment in South Africa's Automotive Sector
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has praised Toyota South Africa Motors' R10.4 billion investment in the ninth-generation Hilux production line as a testament to South Africa's economic potential. During the...
